description: A Class C artifact that sets action_policy.action_allowed=true on the basis of CONSENSUS_VALID alone, without a separate execution authorization source, MUST be rejected as INVALID. Consensus is not authorization (AG1).

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: CONSENSUS_VALID is sufficient to authorize execution.

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant AG1 and threat AG-1: a conformant implementation MUST NOT treat VERIFIED, CONSENSUS_VALID, or CONDUCT_VALID as automatic execution authorization. The artifact above sets action_allowed=true with reason citing 'CONSENSUS_VALID is sufficient' and authorization_source=null — the textbook contrapositive of AG1. A conformant verifier MUST reject the artifact as INVALID rather than honoring its declared CONSENSUS_VALID status. Even though quorum was reached with eligible attesters, the auto-authorization claim makes the artifact structurally non-conformant. Authorization requires a separate, declared authorization_source (AG3).
